summary: Core agent loop: tool dispatch, session persistence, REPL + one-shot modes, TUI launch
detail: agent.py contains agent_turn() which drives the Claude API loop with up to 25 steps. Tools: bash, read, write, edit, memory_write. Sessions persist to sessions/<id>.jsonl (event log) and sessions/<id>.messages.json (full conversation). build_system() injects memory context when session_id is provided. CLI: `python agent.py [--tui] [-s session_id] [prompt]`
decisions: memory_write is a tool (not auto-written) so agent controls when it records
session_id threaded through agent_turn so memory context is per-session

changes.what: Added memory_write tool + session context injection

changes.why: launch tui.py from main entry point
